tasks.name: Scaffold React workspace
tasks.description: Initialize the React TypeScript workspace, wire the Vite proxy, keep the entry HTML minimal, and prepare the shared styling baseline for the snake game frontend.

tasks.name: Scaffold GoFrame service
tasks.description: Set up the GoFrame v2 backend entrypoint, move the sample service to an isolated HTTP port, and prepare the base storage layout for the snake verification API.

tasks.name: Build snake engine
tasks.description: Implement the snake movement engine, direction queueing rules, shared frontend types, and the React hook that drives the game loop and keyboard input.

tasks.name: Implement game dashboard
tasks.description: Build the main gameplay screen, connect the frontend API client, surface health and leaderboard state, and render the responsive snake board UI.

tasks.name: Implement GoFrame scoreboard domain
tasks.description: Create the backend game model, service contract, and file-backed scoreboard logic that persists snake runs and returns sorted leaderboard results.

tasks.name: Expose GoFrame HTTP APIs
tasks.description: Publish the health, config, and score submission endpoints through GoFrame API definitions and controllers so the React app can consume them.

tasks.name: Add regression verification assets
tasks.description: Add focused frontend and backend tests plus a root README so the snake sample can be validated quickly after recreation.
